parents.subject: LU-16518 lfsck: remove outdated EXPORT_SYMTAB ref

commit.subject: LU-930 lfsck: improve lfsck error messages
commit.message:
LU-930 lfsck: improve lfsck error messages

Print incorrect input argument in error message.
Print errors as strings instead of numeric values.
Put error message strings on a single line.
Capitalize variable values in usage message.
Fix typo in lfsck_get_dev_name() variable name.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-lfsck
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Change-Id: I61366b5cd57c8a3d4b9c96fc5b108fe039788087
